aboleth.alt: A huge blue-gray aboleth with three eyes and four tentacles glides through a dark underwater cavern.

animated-armor.alt: An empty dark-steel suit of animated plate armor advances through a castle corridor with raised fists.

animated-flying-sword.alt: An unsupported steel sword darts through a dark armory with faint blue runes glowing along its blade.

awakened-shrub.alt: A small awakened shrub scuttles across a woodland floor on tangled roots with thorny branches raised.

axe-beak.alt: A towering rust-black axe beak charges across grassland on two legs with its huge wedge-shaped bill forward.

baboon.alt: A lean gray-brown baboon bounds over a rocky woodland ledge with its long tail arched behind it.

badger.alt: A striped badger braces at the mouth of a forest burrow with soil clinging to its digging claws.

bandit.alt: A small hooded bandit waits beside a lonely road with scimitar drawn and crossbow on their back.

bat.alt: A small charcoal-brown bat banks through the moonlit mouth of a limestone cave.

blink-dog.alt: A golden blink dog reappears in a running bound on a forest path with a pale afterimage behind it.

blood-hawk.alt: A rust-breasted blood hawk dives above a pine slope with slate wings tucked and talons extended.

boar.alt: A dark bristled wild boar charges across wet forest earth with curved tusks lowered.

camel.alt: A one-humped sand-colored camel strides across a desert track on broad padded feet.

cat.alt: A lean gray tabby cat pauses on a garden wall with one paw raised and green-gold eyes alert.

commoner.alt: A compact adult commoner in patched work clothes holds a plain wooden club defensively in a farmyard.

constrictor-snake.alt: A large olive-and-brown constrictor coils around a mossy trunk with its broad head raised.

couatl.alt: An iridescent feathered couatl coils in the air with broad wings spread above a misty temple clearing.

crab.alt: A mottled shore crab scuttles sideways over a wet tide-pool rock with one pincer raised.

cultist.alt: A compact hooded cultist advances through a ruined cellar shrine with an iron ritual sickle.

deer.alt: A russet deer pauses mid-step in a dawn forest glade, antlered head turned toward a sound.

draft-horse.alt: A powerful dark bay draft horse leans into a plain work harness on a muddy village lane.

dretch.alt: A squat gray-green dretch hunches over cracked stone as yellowish fetid vapor gathers around it.

eagle.alt: A brown-and-cream eagle banks toward a coastal cliff with its broad wings cupped and talons extended.

elk.alt: A large russet elk drives through a mountain meadow with its broad antler rack lowered.

fire-elemental.alt: A towering humanoid-shaped fire elemental surges across blackened ground in a shower of embers.

fire-giant.alt: A colossal charcoal-skinned fire giant in black plate stands in a volcanic forge with a flaming sword.

flying-snake.alt: A tiny emerald-and-copper flying snake banks through a jungle gap on two feathered wings.

frog.alt: A tiny moss-green frog crouches on a rain-wet leaf beside a forest pool, ready to leap.

gelatinous-cube.alt: A transparent gelatinous cube fills a stone corridor, with bubbles and corroded scraps suspended inside.

ghost.alt: A pale translucent ghost in tattered garments reaches forward while drifting through a moonlit ruin.

giant-badger.alt: A boar-sized striped giant badger bursts from a forest bank with one massive digging paw raised.

giant-bat.alt: A horse-sized charcoal giant bat sweeps through a cavern on broad veined wings with huge ears raised.

giant-centipede.alt: A man-long rust-black giant centipede curves across a wet cave wall on dozens of jointed legs.

giant-crab.alt: A giant red-brown crab braces in shallow surf with two massive pincers spread wide.

giant-fire-beetle.alt: A large dark fire beetle climbs through a cavern, two orange glands above its eyes lighting the shell.

giant-frog.alt: A wolf-sized mottled giant frog leaps from a swamp bank with webbed feet spread and mouth open.

giant-lizard.alt: A massive olive giant lizard clings diagonally to an overgrown ruin wall on four clawed feet.

giant-rat.alt: A terrier-sized brown giant rat creeps over sewer rubble with its thick naked tail curved behind it.

giant-weasel.alt: A wolf-long chestnut giant weasel flows over a mossy log in a stretched running bound.

goat.alt: A cream-and-brown goat picks its way down a rocky hill with curved horns and cloven hooves.

goblin-minion.alt: A wiry green goblin minion darts from behind a ruined stone with a dagger held close.

goblin-warrior.alt: A small green-skinned goblin warrior crouches on a forest path with scimitar drawn and shortbow ready.

guard.alt: A compact town guard holds a gateway with a round shield forward and a plain spear ready.

hawk.alt: A small rust-and-cream hawk turns sharply above a grassland with its barred tail fanned.

homunculus.alt: A tiny clay homunculus hovers over an arcane worktable on broad leathery wings.

hyena.alt: A spotted hyena with heavy shoulders trots through dry grass with its blunt muzzle held low.

imp.alt: A tiny red imp hovers in a dark stone alcove with leathery wings spread and barbed tail raised.

jackal.alt: A tawny jackal pauses on a dune crest with one paw lifted and tall ears alert.

kobold-warrior.alt: A small russet-scaled kobold warrior crouches in a mine passage with dagger poised and tail extended.

lemure.alt: A sagging pale lemure drags its shapeless body across cracked infernal stone, leaving oily slime.

lizard.alt: A mottled olive lizard clings head-down to a sunlit stone wall on widely spread toes.

mastiff.alt: A powerful brindled mastiff steps forward barking in a lamplit stable courtyard.

merfolk-skirmisher.alt: A sea-green merfolk skirmisher turns through a kelp channel with a cold-glowing ocean spear.

mule.alt: A dun pack mule climbs a rocky hill trail with long ears forward and balanced canvas bundles.

noble.alt: A compact noble in a navy travel coat holds a slender rapier in a poised manor courtyard stance.

octopus.alt: A rust-and-gray octopus crawls over a reef stone on eight sucker-lined arms.

owl.alt: A small mottled owl glides silently above a branch with broad wings spread and dark eyes forward.

owlbear.alt: A huge brown owlbear lunges through a forest, its owl face and feathered mantle rising from a bear body.

piranha.alt: A silver piranha with a red belly turns through dark river water, triangular teeth visible.

pony.alt: A sturdy chestnut pony trots across a green paddock with its thick cream mane lifting.

rat.alt: A small brown rat sniffs the air beside a cellar crack with its long tail curved behind it.

raven.alt: A glossy black raven lands on a weathered signpost with its broad wings open and beak parted.

red-dragon-wyrmling.alt: A juvenile red dragon crouches on volcanic rock, wings spread and smoke curling from its jaws.

scorpion.alt: A sand-colored scorpion raises its segmented tail and spreads two pincers on a desert stone.

seahorse.alt: A tiny ochre seahorse anchors its curled tail to sea grass while hovering upright in clear water.

shrieker-fungus.alt: A pale shrieker fungus opens its quivering purple-gray cap in a damp subterranean cavern.

spider.alt: A tiny brown spider hangs beneath a silver web strand with eight legs spread toward a vibration.

stirge.alt: A bat-sized stirge approaches on two veined wings with four pincer-tipped legs open and a long proboscis forward.

venomous-snake.alt: A small olive viper coils in woodland leaves with its triangular head raised and fangs visible.

vulture.alt: A dark vulture lands on a dry ridge with broad wings raised around its bare gray-pink head.

warrior-infantry.alt: A compact infantry warrior braces behind a tall wooden shield with a plain spear leveled.

weasel.alt: A slender chestnut weasel rises beside a tree root with forepaws tucked and nose lifted.
